data.name: Amazon Passion
data.detailed_description:
He did not know the territory. He was a stranger in a strange land. People talked about strange beings living here, but he did not believe it. Well, now he does!SHE knew the rules of her homelands all too well. And now she would be the one in charge, the one in power. He had no idea what was in store for him, but she would make sure he would never forget!

Key Features

• Full HD+ (1920x1440 pixels) resolution graphics

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• 100% uncensored sex scenes of Man on Futa and Futa on Man

• Amazon’s and Barbarian's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Attacked by an Amazon, a barbarian warrior has no time to unsheathe his sword. The amazon, however, has plenty of time to unsheathe his pork sword – and hers as well! The guy had never experienced anything like this. She knew so much about manhood no woman could ever know...
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
